subcodes.first_line: O Leaf of the Bayán! Hearken unto the call of thy Lord, the All-Merciful. Verily, He hath turned toward thee from the precincts of the Prison and hath revealed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقه البیان اسمعی ندآء ربک الرحمن انه توجه الیک من شطر السجن و انزل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement
